title: Combination Sum IV
problem_statement: Given an array of distinct integers and a target, return the number of possible combinations that add up to the target. Order matters.
intuition: Define dp[t] as the number of combinations to reach t and build from smaller targets.

approaches.name: 1D DP over target
approaches.description: Use a one-dimensional DP array where each target adds combinations from previous reachable targets.
approaches.why_not: Backtracking without memoization duplicates many equivalent partial combinations.

interview_qa.a: Different orders of the same numbers are counted as distinct combinations for this problem.
The number of ordered combinations that sum to t.
